name: academic-framework-figure
description: Generate Image 2 academic concepts, reconstruct them in draw.io, and validate publication-quality method figures.

interface.longDescription: Calls Image 2 for layout concepts or original raster evidence, routes a paper method to one of three evidence-derived styles, reconstructs it as a native draw.io diagram, and checks XML, embedded images, fonts, exports, and paper-scale readability.
defaultPrompt: Turn my method into an editable draw.io figure.
Generate an Image 2 concept, then rebuild it as an editable academic framework figure.
Rebuild this framework figure in a top-conference style.
Audit my academic figure for layout and editability.
